# Managed Block Example

Illustrative (a real run derives every row from disk; your skills and categories will differ). Shows the marker pair, the generated comment, category `###` subsections, and the three-column row shape. The `## Skills` heading above the opening marker is human-authored and left untouched.

````text
## Skills

<!-- skills:start -->
<!-- Generated by bootstrapping-readme — do not edit by hand; rerun the skill. -->

### apply-chain

| Skill | What it does | Kind |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [grilling](skills/apply-chain/grilling/SKILL.md) | Use before any creative or build work to turn a fuzzy idea into a shared, concrete design. | auto-routed |
| [writing-specs](skills/apply-chain/writing-specs/SKILL.md) | Use to turn an approved design or written requirements into a concrete spec. | auto-routed |

### authoring

| Skill | What it does | Kind |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [writing-skills](skills/authoring/writing-skills/SKILL.md) | Test-first methodology for authoring, editing, and validating skills. | user-invoked |

### entrypoints

| Skill | What it does | Kind |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [sdd](skills/entrypoints/sdd/SKILL.md) | Run the full spec-driven pipeline end-to-end on a feature or change. | alias |

<!-- skills:end -->
````

Flat-render variant (a repo whose skills sit directly under ROOT with no category folders) — one table, no `###`:

````text
<!-- skills:start -->
<!-- Generated by bootstrapping-readme — do not edit by hand; rerun the skill. -->

| Skill | What it does | Kind |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [deploy](skills/deploy/SKILL.md) | Ship the current branch to staging. | auto-routed |

<!-- skills:end -->
````
